title: Language Change  - Tab when the internet is off
scenario: Language settings greyed out with "Feature unavailable" dialog when internet is disconnected on Device Settings screen
steps: 1. Ensure the mobile device has no internet connection (e.g., enable Airplane Mode or turn off Wi-Fi and mobile data).
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
4. Tap on the connected Poly audio device to open Device Settings.
5. In Device Settings, locate and tap on the Language option.
6. Observe that the Language tab is greyed out.
7. Tap on the greyed-out Language tab.
9. Tap the "Ok got it" button on the dialog.
expected: The Language tab should be accessible and functional regardless of internet connectivity, as language settings are a local device feature.
